title: Welcome to the new Games from Québec website!
author: La Guilde du jeu vidéo du Québec
excerpt: We are thrilled to launch the brand-new Games from Québec — a revamped hub dedicated to showcasing the incredible depth, diversity, and talent of Québec's video game industry.

title: A Brief History of Our Industry
author: La Guilde du jeu vidéo du Québec
excerpt: Québec's video game industry didn't happen by accident. It was built over four decades by thousands of developers, artists, designers, and entrepreneurs who chose to bet on games as a legitimate cultural and economic force.
